subcodes.first_line: O Varqa! Know thou and recognize that We have chosen thee for Our remembrance, and have shown thee the path of Our grace and mercy, and have given thee to drink [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقاء اعلم ثم اعرف انا اصطفیناک لذکری و عرفناک سبیل فضلی و رحمتی و سقیناک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @service to others; to the Cause of God
